# Thor Henning Hetland (Totto)

> Software architect, AI development pioneer, co-founder of JavaZone, founder of eXOReaction. Based in Oslo, Norway.

Thor Henning Hetland — known as Totto — has been building software professionally for over 30 years. He is the creator of Skill-Driven Development (SDD), a methodology for structured human-AI collaboration, and the founder of eXOReaction AS, an AI-augmented software development consultancy in Oslo. He co-founded JavaZone (Scandinavia's largest developer conference) in 2001, served as president of javaBin (the Norwegian Java User Group) from 1998 to 2008, and was appointed Sun Java Champion in 2005 — the first in Scandinavia.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://wiki.totto.org/about/): Bio, background, current work, and contact
- [CV (English)](https://wiki.totto.org/about/cv-english/): Full employment history and credentials
- [CV (Norwegian)](https://wiki.totto.org/about/cv-norwegian/): Full CV in Norwegian
- [Organizations](https://wiki.totto.org/about/organizations/): Community and organizational leadership history
- [Presentations](https://wiki.totto.org/about/presentations/): 70+ conference talks, workshops, and publications (2006–2023)
- [Open Source](https://wiki.totto.org/open-source/): Projects across eXOReaction and Cantara GitHub organizations
- [Sci-Fi Reading](https://wiki.totto.org/interests/sci-fi/): 583 books tracked across 15 years (2011–2025) — space opera, hard sci-fi, military SF

## Full Content (machine-readable)

- [Full profile and CV (clean markdown)](https://wiki.totto.org/llms-full.txt): Full profile, CV, open source work, and all 70 blog posts (Apr 2025–Feb 2026, plus 19-post 2009 cloud series)

## Writing

70 posts at [wiki.totto.org/blog](https://wiki.totto.org/blog/). Topics: AI-augmented development methodology, Skill-Driven Development, knowledge infrastructure, temporal analytics, AI co-workers, software architecture, and a 2009 cloud computing series. Most 2025–2026 posts co-authored with Claude Code. Six named reading series (IronClaw agent integration, Four-Layer AI Stack, Knowledge Context Protocol, Aurora & Temporal Analytics, Frøya, Building lib-pcb) with prev/next navigation at [wiki.totto.org/blog/series](https://wiki.totto.org/blog/series/).

## LinkedIn Writing

14 posts at [wiki.totto.org/notes/linkedin-posts](https://wiki.totto.org/notes/linkedin-posts/). Shorter-form than the blog — more immediate, mid-build thinking. Topics: knowledge infrastructure, AI velocity, Synthesis, Skill-Driven Development, team setup in the AI era. Nov 2025 – Feb 2026. Full text in [llms-full.txt](https://wiki.totto.org/llms-full.txt).

## Quick Facts

- **Location:** Oslo, Norway
- **Contact:** totto@totto.org | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hetland/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/totto)
- **Founded:** eXOReaction AS (2021), Ægis AS (2023), Sunstone Tech AS (2019), Quadim AS (2019)
- **Education:** MSc Computer Science, NTNU (1996); BSc Computer Science, University Centre of Rogaland (1993)
- **Key achievement:** 197,831 lines of production Java built in 11 days using SDD (25–66x faster than industry standard)
- **Methodology:** Skill-Driven Development (SDD) — validated across manufacturing, finance, renewable energy, and AI security
